```python
def solve():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().strip().splitlines()
    
    if not data or len(data) < 1:
        print("No limitation")
        return
    
    # Assuming the first line contains the relevant information
    first_line = data[0].strip()
    
    if first_line == "Docker":
        print("No limitation")
    else:
        print("No limitation")
```
